prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic half-body portrait of a stylish woman standing in sweeping desert sand dunes at golden hour, centered slightly right of frame, with warm sunset backlighting and a shallow depth of field. She has long wavy brunette hair blowing in the wind, wears a flowing sheer beige bohemian dress with embroidered beadwork along the neckline and sleeves, and layered ornate gold necklaces with pendants. The background is softly blurred rolling dunes and distant low hills under a glowing amber sky, with the sun high on the upper right creating rim light, lens warmth, and a luxurious editorial travel-fashion mood. Place a single opaque solid brown rectangular censor block over the entire face, aligned vertically from forehead to chin, matching the warm brown shadow tones of the scene. Use a wide 16:9 horizontal composition, realistic skin and fabric texture, rich golden color grading, natural wind movement, and no visible text, logos, or watermarks.
